full_text:
Zhao Lei 趙累
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Lei (趙累). Said to be loyal and trust-worthy, he died fighting Wu with Guan Yu and Guan Ping. Zhao Lei was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhao Lei lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
